name: youos
description: Learns your writing style from Gmail/Docs/WhatsApp and drafts replies in your voice — by default on a local model fine-tuned on you (LoRA, served warm on Apple Silicon), self-improving nightly. Background agent sweeps unread inbox, drafts replies, queues for review (opt-in; never auto-sends). Exposes a REST + OpenAPI surface (`/api/agent/*`) so orchestrators like Hermes / OpenClaw / a Telegram/Slack bot can drive email triage from your existing chat app. The cloud is only a cold-start/fallback and can be disabled for strict local-only mode.
author: DrBaher

steps: ./scripts/install.sh    # creates .venv, installs YouOS (+ MLX on Apple Silicon), runs the doctor
youos setup             # guided first-run: identity, ingestion, style analysis

required: A Google ingestion backend for Gmail/Docs (ingestion.google_backend): gog CLI (default), Google's gws CLI, or the native Google-API backend (youos[google] extra + OAuth)
optional: Claude/API credentials only if external fallback is enabled
